At Song Heng
“We believe that in the heart
of Thai cuisine, flavor is
not defined by taste alone.
It’s the harmony of carefully
chosen ingredients, cultural
heritage and enduring care
in every detail.”

We bring this philosophy to life through
our range of pickled specialties—from
green mustard and Thai lime to plum, ginger,
garlic and bamboo shoot.

Each product is crafted with the same
intention as a home-cooked meal: to
nourish, to delight, and to connect.

We work closely with local Thai farmers,
selecting distinct native varieties for their
deep aroma and vibrant character.

Our products are thoughtfully prepared
for both convenience and quality, offering
a rich, unmistakably Thai flavor that
elevates every meal.

Because for us, true satisfaction begins

ocr_text:
SONG HENG
ส่งหง
宋兴

With nearly 60 years of passion and dedication, Song Heng's pickling wisdom — rooted in our grandfather's heritage from Shantou, China — has been passed down through three generations since 1969, flourishing within Thai culture.

Today, we operate a high-capacity production facility that meets international standards and proudly export to over 5 continents worldwide.

Driven by a deep respect for Thai culinary heritage, we craft pickled vegetables that embody the bold, distinctive flavors of Thai cuisine – bringing joy and vibrancy to every meal.

This is the spirit behind everything we do.
This is “Zesty Thai Taste.”
